title: Complete Pyramid Circuit
description: 3-round full body circuit followed by an explosive push-up pyramid

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Deep squat hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a deep squat, back straight, elbows against the knees

exercises.name: Goblet squat (no weight)
exercises.instructions: Hands in front of the chest, sit deep

exercises.name: Hindu push-ups
exercises.instructions: Diving motion: dive down then arc back up

exercises.name: Side plank
exercises.instructions: On one forearm, body aligned, hips high

exercises.name: Walking lunges
exercises.instructions: Walk forward in continuous lunges, big steps

exercises.name: Leg raises
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift extended legs to vertical

exercises.name: Explosive push-ups
exercises.instructions: Push hard to lift the hands off the floor

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm against a wall at 90 degrees, pivot the body

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
